raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed XXXX charges on my XX/XX/XXXX Citi Advantage credit card, totaling {$170000.00}. These charges were for a re-booked flights on XXXX XXXX, originally booked on XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/XXXX. The credit for the original price was to be on the XXXX cycle of my credit card bill. The credit did not show up. XXXX XXXX has confirmed that no re-booking occurred and the original tickets are in place. Citi Cards has denied all XXXX disputed charges stating the vendor stated services were provided by them. ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ). We have responded to the decision by disputing the decision by Citi Cards and requiring them to reopen the dispute and conduct a real investigation and process the credit. 

We spent over 2 hours on XX/XX/XXXX trying to talk to the correct department. When we finally got to " Billing Disputes '', we asked for a supervisor. XXXX hung up after we started describing the issue. 

We have sent in all the XXXX XXXX printed documents to Citi Cards with the stated credit amount of {$19000.00}.
